description: Admin sidebar mobile hamburger menu - Replace the current horizontal scroll nav on mobile with a collapsible grouped menu using <details>/<summary> for each nav group. The desktop view stays the same (wrapped flex layout). The mobile view should group items by their 'group' field (Operations, Catalogue, Customers, Marketing, Finance, Administration) and show each group as an expandable section.
steps: In apps/web/components/admin/admin-sidebar.tsx: Keep the existing desktop nav (hidden lg:flex flex-wrap) unchanged. Replace the mobile <details> block (lg:hidden) with a new implementation that: (a) uses a hamburger-style <details>/<summary> outer wrapper with 'Admin menu' as summary text, (b) inside, groups nav items by their `group` field using Object.groupBy or a reduce, (c) renders each group as a collapsible <details> element with the group name as <summary> styled with font-bold text, (d) inside each group, renders the nav links in a grid (grid-cols-1 gap-1) with the same styling pattern (active state with bg-primary text-white, inactive with border and bg-white). The active group should default to open (the group containing the current active route).
Make sure the outer <details> still has the lg:hidden class. Add proper min-h-[44px] touch targets for accessibility. Maintain dark mode support. Keep badge rendering for items with badge > 0.
acceptance_criteria: Desktop nav (lg:flex) remains unchanged - wrapped flex layout
Mobile nav (lg:hidden) shows grouped navigation with expandable sections
Each group (Operations, Catalogue, etc.) is a separate collapsible section
The group containing the active route is open by default
Badge counts still display on items that have them
verification: Read the admin-sidebar.tsx file to verify the grouped mobile layout is implemented correctly
findings: Implemented successfully. Pre-existing TS errors throughout the project (none in admin-sidebar.tsx). The tsc --noEmit has many implicit-any errors in other files that are unrelated to this change.
